app_tagline: Track food expiry dates and reduce waste
about_description: Manage your food items by purchase and expiry dates, sorted by urgency. Quick-add common items with one tap, get freeze tips and recipe links for expiring items. Export/import data as CSV or JSON.
pain_point_description: Food going bad in the fridge because you forgot about it. Keeping track of expiry dates is tedious.
quick_add_description: Tap to add with auto-set expiry from the food database
no_items: No items yet. Use the quick-add buttons or form above to get started.
